cases.name: clear price objection with implicit fit

input.objection: Look, this looks great but $4,500/month is way over what we budgeted. We're a 30-person company and we usually pay $500-800 for tools.
input.context: Mid-funnel call after positive demo. Prospect is the Head of Operations.

input.objection: Let me think about it and I'll get back to you next week.
input.context: First demo. Prospect gave no other reaction. We later learned their CEO does all software approvals.
